title: Smooth Sneaking Mod
description: Bring back smooth sneaking from the future and the past.
body:
A Minecraft 1.8.9/1.12.2 mod that implements smooth sneaking animation that was removed since 1.8 and added again in 1.14.
This only adds visual effect and will not change your behavior at server, so it's not a cheat.

This is fully open source and you can find us on GitHub.

Issue reports are welcome.

Feel free to include in any modpack. :)
